sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102259" key="tamei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰμεῖον</orth>, <sense id="n102259.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ταμιεῖον</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰμέσθαι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τέμνω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
